Task lifecycle contract: Prep (ignite-prep) writes execution briefs; Executor (ignite-execute) ends at in review; Validator (ignite-validate) alone moves a task to Complete after an ignite-validate: proof comment. Route every agent-executable Thermal product, engineering, bug, audit-remediation, or implementation-planning task to Delivery → trythermal.com → Product Build list `901714674310` with initial status `to do`. Use Activation list `901714850948` with `Needs Human` only for a genuine external/vendor, credential, legal, or spend gate. New/captured tasks have no agent-ready or prepped tag. Prep may add agent-ready only when a canonical `## ⚙️ Execution Brief` ends exactly `Execution-ready: YES`, every product decision is resolved, all native predecessor tasks are complete, and exactly one colon-form model:* tag exists; sequence work with native dependencies and prep-blocked successors.
